verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the town of Bethlehem God came down to visit man Wasn't that Love? Wasn't that Love? He knew pain and loneliness As He wore that robe of flesh Wasn't that Love? Wasn't that Love?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Wasn't that Love How He left His home above to die on Calvary Just to save someone like me Everyday I'm still amazed There's only one thing left to say Wasn't that Love? Wasn't that Love?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As He laid there in the tomb He did just what He came to do Wasn't that Love? Wasn't that Love? But He rose up from the grave So I can rise today Wasn't that Love? Wasn't that Love?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: As He stood in Pilate's hall He never said a word at all Wasn't that Love? Wasn't that Love? He heard the mob, "Be crucified!" But He knew that He came to die Wasn't that Love? Wasn't that Love?
